mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bom b LEFT JOIN item i ON b.bom_item = i.item_id WHERE b.bom_usage = 'Y'
AND i.item_type = 30
AND i.item_type = 20
AND ( UPPER(b.bom_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(b.bom_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT b.bom_id AS bomId, b.bom_item AS bomItem, b.bom_name AS bomName, b.bom_content AS bomContent, b.bom_usage AS bomUsage,
i.item_id AS itemId, i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType
FROM bom b LEFT JOIN item i ON b.bom_item = i.item_id
WHERE b.bom_usage = 'Y'
AND i.item_type = 30
AND i.item_type = 20
AND ( UPPER(b.bom_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{bomDTO.searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(b.bom_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{bomDTO.searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{bomDTO.searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{bomDTO.searchKeyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY b.bom_id DESC
) A ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}

SELECT b.bom_id AS bomId, b.bom_item AS bomItem, b.bom_name AS bomName, b.bom_content AS bomContent, b.bom_usage AS bomUsage,
i.item_id AS itemId, i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType
FROM bom b LEFT JOIN item i ON b.bom_item = i.item_id
WHERE b.bom_id = #{bomId}

SELECT bd.bom_dtl_id AS bomDtlId, bd.bom_dtl_bom AS bomDtlBom, bd.bom_dtl_item AS bomDtlItem, bd.bom_dtl_qty AS bomDtlQty, bd.bom_dtl_usage AS bomDtlUsage,
i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType
FROM bom_detail bd LEFT JOIN item i ON bd.bom_dtl_item = i.item_id
WHERE bd.bom_dtl_bom = #{bomId} AND bd.bom_dtl_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY bd.bom_dtl_id

SELECT item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, item_type AS itemType, item_unit AS itemUnit, item_spec AS itemSpec, item_unit_price AS itemPrice
FROM item
WHERE item_usage = 'Y' AND item_type IN (20, 30)
ORDER BY item_id

SELECT item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, item_type AS itemType, item_unit AS itemUnit, item_spec AS itemSpec, item_unit_price AS itemPrice
FROM item
WHERE item_usage = 'Y' AND item_type IN (10, 20)
ORDER BY item_id
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BOM' || BOM_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO bom ( bom_id, bom_item, bom_name, bom_content, bom_usage ) VALUES ( #{bomId}, #{bomItem}, #{bomName}, #{bomContent}, 'Y' )
INSERT INTO bom_detail ( bom_dtl_id, bom_dtl_bom, bom_dtl_item, bom_dtl_qty, bom_dtl_usage ) VALUES ( 'BD' || BDTL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{bomDtlBom}, #{bomDtlItem}, #{bomDtlQty}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE bom SET bom_item = #{bomItem}, bom_name = #{bomName}, bom_content = #{bomContent} WHERE bom_id = #{bomId} AND bom_usage = 'Y'
UPDATE bom_detail SET bom_dtl_usage = 'N' WHERE bom_dtl_bom = #{bomId} AND bom_dtl_usage = 'Y'
